raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I went to Macy 's at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to get a suit. When buying it I was offered to get the Macy 's XXXX XXXX to pay for the items, which I did. It was around {$500.00}. They told me I would be receiving my card within two weeks. I did not receive my card and instead received a fraud alert that someone else was using my card. I tried calling Macy 's support for the card and they said that the bank would be getting in touch with me via mail. Two weeks later I received a letter from the bank with a phone number and reference number. I called and explained the situation, they said the fraud department would start an investigation and I would receive a new card in two weeks. I still haven't received the new card and I have now started receiving calls from Macy 's collection department about paying for the card, which I can't because I never received the card so I can't add it to my account or pay for it, and this has become very frustrating, really wish it can be solved soon.
